name: license-attribution sweep flags a community-installed plugin missing license metadata
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/missing && printf 'name: missing\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/missing/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --check-plugins 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'plugin=missing missing_license' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
